channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Happy Birthday, Denise Richards! See the Sweetest Photos of the Actress with Her 3 Daughters Sami, Lola and Eloise
item.description: Richards, who celebrates her 55th birthday on Feb. 17, 2026, often calls her girls "little pillars of strength"

item.title: Jessica Alba Enjoys a Beach Day in Miami, Plus Sutton Foster, Sarah Michelle Gellar, Ashley Graham and More
item.description: From Los Angeles to New York City, and everywhere in between, see what your favorite stars are up to

item.title: Mariska Hargitay’s Casual Travel 'Fit Included a Puffer Vest, Comfy Jeans, and Sneakers — Recreate It from $23
item.description: She built her ensemble with timeless basics

item.title: Lindsey Vonn Says It Feels ‘Amazing’ to Return Home to U.S., Even Though She’s ‘Not Yet Able to Stand’
item.description: The sports star crashed out of the 2026 Winter Olympics on Feb. 8, suffering a complex tibia

item.title: Rev. Jesse Jackson, Civil Rights Activist and Baptist Minister, Dies at 84
item.description: Born in South Carolina in 1941, the civil rights icon has been on the frontlines of numerous historic events in the U.S.

item.title: Paris Hilton's Hottest Shots Ever! Happy 46th Birthday!
item.description: Paris Hilton's big 46th has us sayin' one thing and one thing only, "THAT'S HOT!" The blonde bombshell -- now married and a mama of two -- kicked off ...

item.title: Reverend Jesse Jackson Dead at 84
item.description: Reverend Jesse Jackson, the civil rights icon who twice ran for U.S. president, has died, according to his family. Jesse's family issued a statement T...

item.title: Paris Hilton Birthday Finds on Amazon

item.title: Stephen A. Smith Explains Why He's Now Open To Presidential Run, 'Country Sucks'
item.description: Stephen A. Smith says he wants to run for president of the United States, but there's one enormous roadblock ... MONEY! TMZ Sports caught up with the ...

item.title: Nicole Curtis Faces Backlash at Her Kid's School After N-Word Controversy
item.description: Some parents at a SoCal school where Nicole Curtis volunteers as a room parent to her son's class have serious concerns on the heels of her N-word con...
